Description: Tool for mass communication in the Seminary, allowing diverse filters and channels.

fields.description: Required when the audience is term-scoped (enrolled students, teaching instructors, or specific course schedules). Optional for All Alumni or custom-filter broadcasts.
fields.label: Academic Term

fields.description: Routing and consent class. Emergency bypasses recipient consent and the per-account hourly throttle.
fields.label: Category

fields.description: Leave blank to send immediately on submit.
fields.label: Send At

fields.description: Channels to send over. Leave empty to send Email + In-App (the default).
fields.label: Send via channels

fields.description: If a recipient can't be reached on any selected channel (no address, or opted out), send them Email + In-App instead so the announcement still arrives. Email is always available.
fields.label: Email + In-App fallback

fields.description: Rich body for Email and In-App. Required when an Email/In-App channel is selected.
fields.label: Message

fields.description: Plain-text body for length-limited channels (SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram). Leave blank to auto-strip the message above.
fields.label: Short Message

fields.description: Optional recording for the Voice channel — the call plays this instead of reading the text aloud. MP3 or WAV, up to 40 MB (≈40 min); keep it short. Made public so the carrier can fetch it.
fields.label: Voice Recording

fields.description: Applies when the Print channel is selected.
fields.label: Print Options

fields.description: Letter head for the printed PDF. Seminary Default uses the one set in Seminary Settings.
fields.label: Letter Head

fields.description: Print the subject as a heading on the letter. On for newsletters; turn off for a formal letter that opens straight with the body.
fields.label: Print subject as heading

fields.description: Also generate a sheet of mailing labels (PDF) for recipients who have a postal address.
fields.label: Print mailing labels

fields.description: Label-sheet layout. Pick a shipped Avery preset or define your own under Mailing Label Format.
fields.label: Label Format

fields.description: All students with a non-withdrawn Course Enrollment for a Course Schedule in the selected term.
fields.label: All students enrolled this term

fields.description: All instructors listed on a Course Schedule in the selected term.
fields.label: All instructors teaching this term

fields.description: All enabled Alumni Profiles. Term-independent.
fields.label: All alumni

fields.description: If set, narrows the student audience to these programs. Leave empty for all programs.
fields.label: Only these Programs

fields.description: If set, narrows to these course schedules: their students (and, if the instructor checkbox is on, their instructors).
fields.label: Only these Course Schedules

fields.description: Advanced: pick any doctype and filter it. Matching records will also receive the announcement.
fields.label: Filter DocType

fields.description: Name of the email field on the selected doctype (e.g., student_email_id, prof_email, email).
fields.label: Email Field

fields.description: JSON list of filters, e.g. [["Student","enabled","=",1]].
fields.label: Filters (JSON)

fields.description: Populated on submit. Reflects everyone this announcement was sent to, with per-recipient delivery status.
fields.label: Recipients

name: Seminary Announcement
